About the Hackathon

Built for Women.
By Women.

Women Only 18 + Years Any Background Teams of 2–4 Software Solutions

SheBuilds Chennai Hack — Code & Challenge 1.0 is India's national-level, women-only hackathon where aspiring developers, creative problem-solvers, and bold innovators come together on one stage.

Whether you code every day or are just starting out — this is your space to build something real, collaborate with incredible women from across India, and showcase your ideas to industry leaders.

SheBuilds is a non-profit community with 12,000+ members, 500+ events hosted worldwide, and 70+ industry speakers and mentors. This is our biggest event yet.

12K+Members Nationwide
500+Events Hosted
70+Mentors & Speakers
A Legacy of Courage · A Future of Possibilities
Past · Present · Future
Empower · Educate · Elevate
Prizes & Opportunities

Win Big.
Grow Further.

The top teams walk away with cash prizes, exclusive internship offers, and a host of industry-backed opportunities.

👑
₹30,000+
Total Prize Pool
Cash prizes · Internship offers · Industry recognition
🥇
1st Place

Cash Prize + Internship Offer from leading tech companies, plus direct mentorship from industry leaders.

🥈
2nd Place

Cash Prize + Internship Opportunities and recognition across the SheBuilds nationwide network of 12,000+ members.

🥉
3rd Place

Cash Prize + Special Offers including product vouchers, course access, and community-backed growth opportunities.

💼
Internship Offers

Multiple partner companies will extend direct internship offers to outstanding participants — even beyond the top 3.

🎓
Mentorship

All finalists gain access to ongoing mentorship from SheBuilds' network of 70+ industry speakers and tech leaders.

✨
Several More

Surprise rewards, sponsored goodies, certificates of excellence, and exclusive community opportunities for all participants.

Who Can Participate

Open to Every Woman Builder

A women-exclusive hackathon — a safe, supportive, and empowering environment where every idea is valued.

🎓
Students

Undergraduate, postgraduate, or diploma students from any college in India. Any branch — tech or non-tech.

💼
Working Professionals

Women from any industry who want to build, experiment, and solve real-world problems in a competitive setting.

🚀
Freelancers & Founders

Independent builders and startup founders looking to prototype or grow an idea — in 24 focused hours.

♀️
Age Requirement

Open to women aged 18 and above. No upper age limit — ambition never expires.

👥
Team Size

Form teams of 2 to 4 members. All members must be women. Cross-college and cross-city teams are welcome.

💻
What You'll Build

Software solutions only — apps, platforms, tools, or dashboards. Bring your laptop and your vision.

The SheBuilds Story

The Evolution of Women in Tech

From the first lines of code to leading boardrooms — SheBuilds has been part of every step of that journey.

The Past
Breaking Barriers

Women like Ada Lovelace, Grace Hopper, and countless unnamed pioneers proved that technology was never a men-only domain. They wrote the first algorithms, cracked wartime codes, and built the internet's foundations. Their courage is our starting point.

🌱
⚡
The Present
Building Solutions

Today, women are leading engineering teams, founding startups, and shipping products used by millions. SheBuilds Chennai has been part of this momentum — hosting meetups, workshops, and mentorship sessions for 800+ participants across 3 editions in 2026 alone.

The Future
Leading Innovation

The next frontier belongs to women who code, design, and lead with intention. Code & Challenge 1.0 is our biggest step yet — bringing 50 finalist teams to Chennai to build the tools, platforms, and ideas that will shape tomorrow.

🚀
Our Track Record

Workshops We've Conducted

SheBuilds Chennai has been running high-quality workshops and meetups for women in tech — here's what we've built together so far.

Code & Connect · Edition 01
Getting Started in Tech

Our first flagship meetup series — focused on helping women take their first confident step into the tech industry. Sessions on career clarity, networking, and finding your path.

Chennai · 2025 · 200+ Attendees
Code & Connect · Edition 02
Build, Ship, Repeat

Deep dives into product building, GitHub workflows, and shipping real projects. Women founders and senior engineers shared their journeys from idea to deployment.

Chennai · 2025 · 300+ Attendees · 5 Sponsors
Code & Connect · Edition 03
AI & The Future of Work

Our largest edition yet — exploring how women in tech are shaping the AI landscape. 800+ registrations, 10+ sponsors, and sessions from leaders across India's top tech companies.

Chennai · 2026 · 800+ Registrations · 10+ Sponsors
Code & Candid · Monthly Series
Honest Conversations

Our signature podcast-style monthly meetup — real talk on women-specific challenges, taboo topics in tech, and career growth strategies. No filters, no corporate speak.

Monthly · Ongoing · Open to All
Mentorship Circles
1:1 Growth Sessions

Curated mentorship sessions connecting aspiring women with senior engineers, founders, and product leaders from across India's tech ecosystem. Personalised, focused, and impactful.

50+ Mentors · Ongoing Cohorts
Product Showcase
Women-Built Products

A platform for women builders to demo their products — from apps to SaaS tools — to an audience of investors, mentors, and potential users. ₹5L+ disbursed in grants and support.

₹5L+ Grants · 300+ Projects Supported
How It Works

Two Phases.
One Shot at Winning.

A structured, fair competition — from idea submission to live prototype, in two clear stages.

Phase 01 · Online
Submit Your Idea
  • Pick a theme from the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals
  • Submit your idea using our official presentation template
  • Judged on innovation, real-world impact, and feasibility
  • Top 50 teams are shortlisted and invited to the offline finale
June 1Registrations Open
June 30Submissions Close
Phase 02 · Offline · Chennai
Build & Present
  • Top 50 teams come to Rajalakshmi Engineering College, Chennai
  • 24-hour live build sprint — build a working software prototype
  • Present to a panel of industry judges and on-site mentors
  • Compete for ₹30,000+ in prizes and direct internship offers
August 1–2Offline Hackathon
REC, ChennaiVenue
Round 1 Themes

17 Global Goals.
Infinite Ideas.

Your solution must address one of the United Nations' 17 Sustainable Development Goals. Pick the one that moves you most.

FAQ

Questions? We've Got You.

Not at all. Women from any background — engineering, design, business, arts — are welcome. Great ideas don't need a CS degree.
Teams must have 2 to 4 members. If you don't have a team yet, reach out to us on Instagram — we'll help you find co-builders from the community.
Phase 1 (online idea submission) is completely free. Details for Phase 2 (offline hackathon at REC, Chennai) will be shared with shortlisted teams directly.
A presentation using our official template — covering your chosen SDG goal, the problem you're solving, your proposed solution, and its impact. Full guidelines will be sent after you register.
Top 50 teams come to Rajalakshmi Engineering College, Chennai on August 1–2 for a 24-hour build sprint. Build a working software prototype, present to a panel of judges, and compete for prizes and internship offers.
Yes — this is a national-level event. Your team can include women from different colleges, cities, or states across India.
Software solutions only — web apps, mobile apps, platforms, tools, or dashboards. No hardware projects. You'll need a working prototype to present at the offline finale.
✦ Registrations Open · June 1 ✦

Ready to Build
Something Real?

Join women from across India. Submit your idea online by June 30. Top 50 teams compete live in Chennai in August.

📅 Opens June 1 🗓 Closes June 30 👥 Teams of 2–4 🏆 Top 50 to Chennai 💰 ₹30,000+ Prizes
